archimate:DataObject.name: ADMS
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: The Asset Description Metadata Schema (ADMS) is a standard metadata specification developed by the European Commission's ISA² program (Interoperability Solutions for European Public Administrations). ADMS is designed to facilitate the description and discovery of digital assets, particularly in the context of public administration.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Publisher: W3C
Source: https://www.w3.org/TR/vocab-adms/
LOST view: SV-Agnostic Ontologies
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ADMSDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ADMSDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/ControlledVocabularyDataObject

properties.value: The Asset Description Metadata Schema (ADMS) is a standard metadata specification developed by the European Commission's ISA² program (Interoperability Solutions for European Public Administrations). ADMS is designed to facilitate the description and discovery of digital assets, particularly in the context of public administration.
